title: Terminal-Bench submission-arm overlay
$comment: Self-contained overlay mirroring arm-params.schema.json#/$defs/submission. Run it AFTER the base schema (which enforces all 15 fields and additionalProperties:false); this file only tightens the three submission invariants so `check-jsonschema` needs no cross-file $ref. Keep in sync with #/$defs/submission in arm-params.schema.json.

include_tasks.description: A submission covers all 89 tasks — no cherry-picking.

k_trials.description: A submission runs ≥5 trials per task.

upload_public.description: A submission's trials are uploaded publicly to Harbor Hub.
